claim_bullets.bullet_text: We used generators to build iterators that maintain implicit state. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-292) May be applicable to many patterns.
The diagram of the PDF illustrates a generator example. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-292) Might not be fully accurate.
We start by looking at a very simple example of a stateful function. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-292) Could be expanded.

source_record_text: Interactive Generators chapter covering generators, stateful functions, and examples.
